changes.description: Added validate_phase_transition() with forward-only check and stderr warning. Wired into set_feature_phase() in advisory mode (warns but proceeds).
Added _validate_plan_structure() gate at top of plan_to_task_descriptions(). Validates feature, planNumber, tasks (1-3), and each task's name/files/action.
Added phase_check to ship-ready gate. Uses subprocess to call phase-get and warns if not in review/ship phase. Gracefully skips if memory unavailable.

verification.result: pass (phase_check warns as expected for implement phase)
